name: Income at second bracket boundary
description: Employee earning €28,000 exactly. INPS contributions (3.19% after 6pp cuneo fiscale cut) are deducted from gross BEFORE calculating IRPEF. All income taxed at 23% on reduced base, with significant employment credit, €1,000 fixed deduction, and €65 bonus.

sources.description: INPS employee contributions are deducted from gross before IRPEF calculation
At bracket boundary - income taxed at 23% on base after INPS deduction, with significant credits apply
